domain: Brazilian capoeira (Afro-Brazilian martial art + dance, UNESCO ICH): ginga continuous fluid back-and-forth sway baseline (NOT static stance); malicia deception alphabet (wariness/savvy/feint/bait-trap); berimbau single-string musical bow conducts jogo tempo + style; roda circle of singers + clappers participate; jogo is cooperative-deceptive (both players win on game beauty + cleanness, not just trade-win); 5 feint primitives: telegraph-then-switch + bait-trap + cadence-break + range-deception + intent-mirror.
specific_mechanism: CAPOEIRA-GINGA-CONTINUOUS-SWAY-MALICIA-DECEPTION-BERIMBAU-TEMPO-METRONOME-RODA-SPECTATOR-COOPERATIVE-DECEPTIVE-COEVOLUTION: LLM adversarial-coevolution mechanism with (1) ginga continuous-sway state-baseline S_ginga: resting policy is continuous oscillation between 2 sub-policies (attack-ready ↔ defense-ready); never static stance; (2) malicia feint-deception alphabet F_malicia: 5 feint primitives — telegraph-then-switch + bait-trap + cadence-break + range-deception + intent-mirror; attacker-defender each have full F_malicia repertoire; (3) berimbau-tempo metronome M_temp: external rhythm-token modulates adversarial pace; slow-berimbau → slow rich-deception game; fast-berimbau → straight-trade exchange; (4) roda-spectator participation E_roda: clapping-singing spectator-LLMs add call-response tokens shaping jogo (audience reward function); cooperative incentive layer; (5) cooperative-deceptive coevolution loss L_coop-decept: attacker and defender each rewarded for game-beauty + game-cleanness, not just win; cooperative-zero-sum hybrid. Differs from R534 GLIMA-BROKARTOK-FIXED-GRIP-TECHNIQUE-OVER-STRENGTH-COEVOL (Brókartök fixed-grip + technique-only + symmetric + circular-footwork + graceful-fall) and R547 BOKH-NO-WEIGHT-CLASS-3-TOUCH-FALL-9-RANK-EAGLE-DANCE-COEVOL (open-weight + 3-touch + technique-cunning + 9-rank + eagle-dance) by ginga continuous-sway state-baseline + malicia 5-feint deception alphabet + berimbau-tempo metronome + roda-spectator audience-reward + cooperative-deceptive coevolution beauty-cleanness.
llm_application: CAPOEIRA-GINGA-CONTINUOUS-SWAY-MALICIA-DECEPTION-BERIMBAU-TEMPO-METRONOME-RODA-SPECTATOR-COOPERATIVE-DECEPTIVE-COEVOLUTION LLM mechanism + ginga continuous-sway S_ginga 2-sub-policy oscillation baseline + malicia 5-feint F_malicia telegraph-switch bait-trap cadence-break range-deception intent-mirror + berimbau-tempo M_temp slow-rich-deception fast-straight-trade pace + roda-spectator E_roda clap-sing call-response audience-reward + cooperative-deceptive L_coop-decept beauty-cleanness coevolution. Differs from R534 GLIMA (closest — Brókartök fixed-grip + technique-only + symmetric + circular-footwork + graceful-fall). R547 BOKH (closest — open-weight + 3-touch + technique-cunning + 9-rank + eagle-dance). Differs from Red-Teaming Strategies + Active Attacks 2509.21947 + LLM Red-Team Survey + LLM Honeypot by ginga sway + 5-feint alphabet + berimbau-tempo + roda-spectator + cooperative-deceptive. Differs by GINGA CONTINUOUS-SWAY + MALICIA 5-FEINT + BERIMBAU-TEMPO + RODA-SPECTATOR + COOPERATIVE-DECEPTIVE COEVOLUTION.
novelty_claim: Red-Teaming Strategies + Active Attacks 2509.21947 + LLM Red-Team Survey 2410.09097 + LLM Honeypot cover adversarial co-evolution + deception paradigm. CAPOEIRA-GINGA-CONTINUOUS-SWAY-MALICIA-DECEPTION-BERIMBAU-TEMPO-RODA-SPECTATOR-COOPERATIVE-DECEPTIVE adds (a) ginga sway baseline + (b) malicia 5-feint alphabet + (c) berimbau-tempo metronome + (d) roda-spectator audience-reward + (e) cooperative-deceptive coevolution beauty-cleanness. Recombination — borderline lookup.
